title: Honest truth about AI trading bots nobody wants to say out loud.
author: Spirited_Syllabub488
selftext:
We all got into crypto for the same reason. The dream of making money while doing nothing. So when someone says "AI bot that trades for you" - of course it sells. It hits exactly what we want to hear.

I get it. I fell for the same thing early on.

But here's what actually happens. You buy the bot, backtest looks incredible, you go live, first bad week hits and you start tweaking it. Second bad week and you shut it down. Then you watch it would've recovered without you. That cycle - that's what kills most people in algo trading. Not the strategy but themselves.

I spent almost two years building my own system from scratch. Not because I'm smarter than everyone selling these tools. Just because I got tired of trusting something I didn't understand.

And what I found wasn't any kind of secret formula. It was painfully simple stuff. Keep the logic clean. Model your real costs honestly. And build something you can mentally survive during a drawdown - because that moment will come and you will really really want to pull the plug.

I ran my system through the last 6 months. One of the ugliest periods crypto has seen. The model isn't perfect. But it didn't panic and overtrade. It didn't care about Elon's tweets.

That's the actual edge. Not the AI. Removing yourself from the equation and only relying on data, that's what it is all about. Just believe your data and tests.

Most people know this already. The hard part is building something you trust enough to actually leave alone. 

SIMPLICITY BEATS COMPLEXITY. And my profitable machine learning model concept is very simple that people can't even think of the way.

Just my bottleneck is not having enough funds. (Need investors or interested buyers)

Also I gave the last signal of my model publicly and it is trading in around 3,000 points of PROFIT - [https://www.reddit.com/r/ai\_trading/comments/1rcn1kd/my\_ml\_model\_prediction\_for\_next\_4\_days/?utm\_source=share&utm\_medium=web3x&utm\_name=web3xcss&utm\_term=1&utm\_content=share\_button](https://www.reddit.com/r/ai_trading/comments/1rcn1kd/my_ml_model_prediction_for_next_4_days/?utm_source=share&utm_medium=web3x&utm_name=web3xcss&utm_term=1&utm_content=share_button)

That's where everyone struggles. Including me for a long time.

comments.author: GordonLevinson
comments.body: AI trading bots are definitely the future. It’s more logical and rational than us. I traded 4 month and has got a decent return
